name: Swig of Hope
description: A short story in staying hopeful, for tomorrow is a new day.
prelude: Wrongly-incarcerated, you abide the rules of a prison and try to survive day by day... Until a fateful day.

quests.name: Embrace the day
quests.description: After waking up, you notice your cell door open. It seems like it is time to escape.

items.name: Holy Pendant
items.description: Its old, rusty and the handle is wiggly, but it can protect against the unholy.
